overview.description: The ProShares Ultra COIN (COIA) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in financials equity. The fund provides 2x exposure to the daily returns of Coinbase Global (NASDAQ: COIN) stock, less expenses. COIA was launched on Sep 8, 2025 and is issued by ProShares.
